candidates.why: Represents operating revenues; matches total revenue figures and is a primary revenue line item.
Explicit total revenue line equal to operating revenues; good alternate label for some years.
This is a cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Financial income is non-operating and not top-line revenue.
Interest income is financial income, not sales revenue.
Explicitly non-operating; not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not the revenue flow.
Tax liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Both 'Operating revenues' and 'Total Revenue' represent the same top-line sales figure; including both provides a robust priority list over time.

candidates.why: Component of cost of goods sold but not the main aggregated COGS line.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Clearly labeled COGS but appears partially populated; however 'Cost of revenues/COGS' matches the main COGS total.
Adjustment to inventory, not the full COGS measure.
Explicit combined COGS line that matches raw materials/consumables figures; best single proxy for total COGS.
Employee overhead, not strictly direct COGS; better treated as operating expenses/SG&A where relevant.
Operating overhead/SG&A, not COGS.
Other non-core items, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
R&D, not COGS.
R&D, not COGS.
Inventory component on the balance sheet, not the expense flow.
Liability, not COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the aggregated 'Cost of revenues/COGS' line as the primary COGS measure rather than its components or unrelated expenses.

candidates.why: Typical operating overhead/SG&A bucket excluding COGS and D&A; appropriate SG&A component.
Share-based compensation is part of personnel/overhead expenses, typically included in SG&A.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total exists; using main overhead components 'Other operating expenses' and 'Share-Based Compensation' as SG&A components while avoiding totals or COGS/D&A lines.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization component related to R&D, but not the full R&D expense line.
Supplemental disclosure of R&D; secondary to the main R&D expense line.
Primary P&L line explicitly labeled as R&D expenses; best choice for XRD.
Capitalized R&D asset, not the period expense.
Total R&D expenditure including components; more of a summary line; the main expense line is preferable.
Balance sheet adjustment, not the R&D expense flow.

variables.notes: Chose the main income statement line 'Research and Development Expenses' as the R&D expense measure, rather than supplemental or total summary lines.

candidates.why: Primary line for interest expense; best first-choice measure for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; secondary interest expense component to use if main interest expense is missing.
Represents profit attributable to minority shareholders, not interest expense.
Same as 'Minority interest'; not an interest expense.
Equity holder share of profit, not interest on debt.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest; good tertiary fallback for XINT.
Debt balance, not the expense.
Debt balance, not the expense.
Debt balance, not the expense.
Equity, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of interest expense lines, starting with the general 'Interest Expense' and then lease-specific interest lines as fallbacks.

candidates.why: Represents equity attributable to the parent/majority owners, excluding non-controlling interests; best proxy for book equity (BE).
Includes both majority and non-controlling interests; would double-count MIB if used for BE.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing line, not a substantive equity measure.
Represents total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity alone.

variables.notes: Used 'Majority equity' as equity attributable to owners/parent, which excludes non-controlling interests and aligns with the BE definition.

candidates.why: Flow measure of profit attributable to minorities; not the balance sheet stock but related conceptually.
Duplicate flow measure; not ideal for balance-sheet-based MIB.
Flow measure in the income statement; not the equity stock.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; best choice for MIB stock value.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests on the balance sheet; good fallback if primary line missing.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance sheet non-controlling interest lines; provided both primary and alternate labels as a priority list while avoiding income statement flow measures.
